steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$g \left(x\right)={x}^{2}+55$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $55$.

steps.title: Read the vertex from the equation
steps.content: $g(x)=x^2+55$ is in vertex form $(x-0)^2+55$, so the vertex is $(0,55)$.

steps.title: State the minimum
steps.content: Since $a=1\gt0$, the parabola opens upward — the vertex is the minimum. The minimum value is $g(0)=55$, the output at the vertex. B is correct.
